info.title: The Selling Partner API for Amazon Warehousing and Distribution
info.description: The Selling Partner API for Amazon Warehousing and Distribution (AWD) provides programmatic access to information about AWD shipments and inventory.

parameters.description:
Get the replenishment orders updated after certain time (Inclusive)
Date should be in ISO 8601 format as defined by date-time in - https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc3339.
parameters.name: updatedAfter

parameters.description:
Get the replenishment orders updated before certain time (Inclusive)
Date should be in ISO 8601 format as defined by date-time in - https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc3339.
parameters.name: updatedBefore

parameters.description: Sort the response in ASCENDING or DESCENDING order. The default sort order is DESCENDING.
parameters.name: sortOrder

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: Sorts the collection in ascending order.
Sorts the collection in descending order

parameters.description: Maximum results to be returned in a single response.
parameters.name: maxResults

parameters.description: A token that is used to retrieve the next page of results. The response includes `nextToken` when the number of results exceeds the specified `maxResults` value. To get the next page of results, call the operation with this token and include the same arguments as the call that produced the token. To get a complete list, call this operation until `nextToken` is null. Note that this operation can return empty pages.
parameters.name: nextToken

x-amzn-RateLimit-Limit.description: Your rate limit (requests per second) for this operation.

400.description: Request has missing or invalid parameters and cannot be parsed.

x-amzn-RateLimit-Limit.description: Your rate limit (requests per second) for this operation.

errors.details: This exception is thrown when client inputs are invalid

403.description: Indicates that access to the resource is forbidden. Possible reasons include Access Denied, Unauthorized, Expired Token, or Invalid Signature.

404.description: The resource specified does not exist.

x-amzn-RateLimit-Limit.description: Your rate limit (requests per second) for this operation.

413.description: The request size exceeded the maximum accepted size.

415.description: The request payload is in an unsupported format.

429.description: The frequency of requests was greater than allowed.

500.description: An unexpected condition occurred that prevented the server from fulfilling the request.

503.description: Temporary overloading or maintenance of the server.

get.description:
Retrieves all the AWD replenishment orders pertaining to a merchant with optional filters.
API by default will sort orders by updatedAt attribute in descending order.

DistributionIneligibleReason.description: Execution errors associated with the replenishment order. This field will be populated if the order failed validation.

failureCode.description: Failure code details of the error.

ReplenishmentOrderListing.description: A list of paginated replenishment orders filtered by the attributes passed in the request.

nextToken.description: A token that is used to retrieve the next page of results. The response includes `nextToken` when the number of results exceeds the specified `maxResults` value. To get the next page of results, call the operation with this token and include the same arguments as the call that produced the token. To get a complete list, call this operation until `nextToken` is null. Note that this operation can return empty pages.

confirmedOn.description: Date on which this replenishment order was confirmed.

createdAt.description: Date on which this replenishment order was created.

distributionIneligibleReasons.description:
Distribution errors associated with the order related to the products or packages to replenish.
This field will be populated if the order has products or packages which failed validation.

eligibleProducts.description: List of product units that are eligible for replenishment.

orderId.description: Order Id of the replenishment order.

outboundShipments.description: List of outbound shipments that are part of this order.

products.description: Requested amount of single product units to be replenished.

shippedProducts.description: Outbound product units that are shipped after the execution has completed post confirmation.

updatedAt.description: Date on which this replenishment order was last updated.

ErrorList.description: This exception is thrown when client inputs are invalid.

errors.description: A list of errors describing the failures.

Error.description: Error response returned when the request is unsuccessful.

code.description: An error code that identifies the type of error that occurred.

details.description: Additional details that can help the caller understand or fix the issue.

message.description: A message that describes the error condition.

OutboundShipmentStatus.description: Possible shipment statuses for outbound shipments.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: Shipment is created. No inventory has been picked up at the source node.
Carrier acknowledged that the shipment is in transit between the origin node and destination node.
Carrier indicated that the shipment has arrived at the destination node, but the destination node has not acknowledged the delivery.
Destination node acknowledged the arrival of the shipment.
Destination node has received the items.
No more actions are required for the shipment. This is a final state.
Shipment has been cancelled by order owner. This is a final state.
Shipment delivery has failed. This is a final state.

ProductAttribute.description: Product instance attribute that is not described at the SKU level in the catalog.

DistributionProduct.description: Represents a product with sku details and corresponding quantity

attributes.description:
Attributes for this instance of the product, i.e. already-prepped, or other
attributes that distinguish the product beyond the SKU.

OutboundShipmentSummary.description:
Summary of an AWD inbound shipment containing the shipment ID which can be used to
fetch the actual shipment

createdAt.description: Timestamp denoting when the shipment was created

orderId.description: Order ID of AWD inbound order this inbound shipment belongs to

updatedAt.description: Timestamp denoting when the shipment was updated

ReplenishmentOrderStatus.description: Statuses supported for an replenishment order.

x-docgen-enum-table-extension.description: The order enters this state as soon as the order is confirmed.
A newly created replenishment order will always start in this state. On UI, this status is called DRAFT
This is the only state when an order can be confirmed.
The order is being executed in the system.

If any of the shipment reports failure or does not reach the destination,
the order status is marked as failed

If the validation results in a failure, the order will be in this state.
In this state, a validation errors field will be provided to show the
errors with the order and potential guidance on fixing them.

The order executing is complete and the order is awaiting the moving of inventory.
In this status, the shipments for an order will be visible.
If all the shipments are successfully received at the destination channel, the order is marked successful.

The order is being validated asynchronously.
The order will be in this state after every item update.
